applets.name: Horizon Mexico Interactive Map
applets.description: A professional interactive map for Forza Horizon 5 featuring locations, filtering, and progress tracking.

applets.name: Horizon Convoy Creator
applets.description: Generate high-octane convoy titles for Forza Horizon 5. Customize by activity, class, and vibe to find the perfect crew.

applets.name: RepoAgent Creator
applets.description: Generate specialized AI agents for any GitHub repository to help you understand, build, and extend projects.

applets.name: Agentic Prompt Architect
applets.description: A professional tool for crafting high-precision AI agent prompts for application and website development.

applets.name: InfoGenius
applets.description: Using Google search grounding you are able to research topics and instantly generate verified visuals tailored to your audience.

applets.name: PokeBead
applets.description: A cute React app that generates Pokémon-themed bracelet beading patterns using Gemini AI. Perfect for crafting fans.

applets.name: ArtMaster AI
applets.description: An interactive AI-powered drawing tutor that provides real-time feedback, step-by-step lessons, and voice-guided artistic coaching.

applets.name: Bring Any Idea to Life
applets.description: Upload an image of a board game, floor layout, or anything you can think of to turn it into an interactive experience.

applets.name: Maps Styling
applets.description: Give your Google Map a new personality to match your brand, your mood, or the spirit of your favorite holiday

applets.name: 4K Wallpapers
applets.description: A next-generation AI wallpaper creator using Gemini 3 Pro. Generate stunning 2K and 4K backgrounds with a polished, professional interface.

applets.name: Product Mockup Visualization
applets.description: A professional design studio that generates photo realistic product mock-ups from uploaded or AI created assets.
